description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the openjdk:8-jdk Docker image and define variables ANDROID_BUILD_TOOLS=24.0.0, ANDROID_COMPILE_SDK='28', ANDROID_SDK_TOOLS=24.4.1. Add a before_script that runs apt-get --quiet update --yes, apt-get --quiet install --yes wget tar unzip lib32stdc++6 lib32z1, downloads the Android SDK tarball with wget --quiet --output-document=android-sdk.tgz https://dl.google.com/android/android-sdk_r${ANDROID_SDK_TOOLS}-linux.tgz, extracts it with tar --extract --gzip --file=android-sdk.tgz, then uses echo y | android-sdk-linux/tools/android --silent update sdk --no-ui --all --filter for android-${ANDROID_COMPILE_SDK}, platform-tools, build-tools-${ANDROID_BUILD_TOOLS}, extra-android-m2repository, extra-google-google_play_services, and extra-google-m2repository, sets ANDROID_HOME=$PWD/android-sdk-linux and updates PATH, and makes ./gradlew executable. Define a single stage named build and a build job that runs ./gradlew assembleDebug, collects the app/build/outputs/ directory as artifacts, and runs on all branches without additional rules.
